items.title: Clearer item count in list view
items.description: Items header now shows only active (pending) item count instead of total — no more confusion with completed items counted separately.

items.title: Simplified item interactions
items.description: Removed undo snackbars from toggle, delete, and clear completed — cleaner, faster interactions.

items.title: Stronger Firestore list permissions
items.description: Permission checks now enforced at the Firestore layer for more secure list operations.

items.title: Fixed Firestore member timestamps
items.description: Member data with Firestore timestamps now parses correctly without date errors.

items.title: Streamlined Firestore storage
items.description: Simplified Firestore storage layer for better reliability and fewer edge cases.

items.title: Collapsible completed items
items.description: Completed items are now grouped under a collapsible section — tap 'Completed (N)' to expand or collapse.

items.title: Removed duplicate list name from app bar
items.description: List name already shown in header below — removing it from AppBar fixes truncation and gives actions more space.

items.title: Circular progress in list header
items.description: Replaced linear progress bar with animated circular ring — header is now a single compact row.

items.title: Compact list header
items.description: Reduced header size to show more items — sharing status moved to app bar, tighter spacing.
